task.title: Refactor config loading for CLI startup

suggest_skills.reason: Config changes touch CLI defaults and memory hook behavior.

skills.label: Config Safety
skills.why: Protect backward-compatible config parsing and defaults.

checks: Run targeted tests for config parsing and CLI execution.
Keep README examples aligned if config flags or defaults change.

fallback.instruction: If no skill can be auto-routed, continue with the task and keep the checks list visible to the operator.
